title: senna apiculata var. longipes
intro: Senna apiculata var. longipes is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as senna or cassia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used for its laxative effects. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which have been found to have various health benefits, including relieving constipation and aiding in digestion. Traditionally, the leaves and pods of Senna apiculata var. longipes are used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote bowel movements and overall gastrointestinal health.
